offline.banner: No connection. Changes will sync when back online.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.timerSoundDesc: Play sound when rest timer ends
preferences.timerSoundDescription: Play sound when rest timer ends
preferences.restNotificationsDescription: Alert even when the app is in background or the phone is locked
preferences.restNotificationsSystemDisabled: System permission disabled. Tap to re-enable
preferences.restNotificationsBlockedBody: To alert you when rest ends we need system permission. Enable it in Settings.
preferences.showRirDesc: Show RIR field when logging sets
preferences.showRirDescription: Show RIR field when logging sets
preferences.showSetNotesDesc: Add notes to each individual set
preferences.showSetNotesDescription: Add notes to each individual set
preferences.showSessionNotesDesc: Add general notes to the session
preferences.showSessionNotesDescription: Add general notes to the session
preferences.showVideoUploadDescription: Record and save videos of your sets to review your form
preferences.showWidgetHomeDescription: Show streak count, progress bar and pause option
preferences.weightUnitDescription: Default for all exercises. You can override it individually
preferences.videoDescription: Record and save videos of your sets to review your form
preferences.moreFeaturesDescription: We're working on new features for you
preferences.weightReminderDescription: Show a banner on home if you haven't logged your weight in X days
preferences.measurementsReminderDescription: Show a banner on home if you haven't logged your measurements in X days
preferences.addToHomeDesc: Install the app on your device for quicker access

reminders.weightTitle: It's been {{count}} days since you logged your weight
reminders.measurementsTitle: It's been {{count}} days since you logged your measurements

import.optionsDescription: Configure how you want to import the routine
import.updateExistingDesc: If an exercise already exists, update its configuration (measurement type, muscle group, etc.)

feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe the problem or your suggestion in as much detail as possible
feedback.successToast: Thanks! Your report has been sent
feedback.errorToast: Failed to send report. Please try again

weightUnitChange.title: Change weight unit
weightUnitChange.messageGlobal: You have data saved as {{from}}. How do you want to apply the change to {{to}}?
weightUnitChange.messageExercise: This exercise has data saved as {{from}}. How do you want to apply the change to {{to}}?
weightUnitChange.convertDescription: Multiplies the saved weights by the conversion factor (e.g. 80 kg → 176.37 lb)
weightUnitChange.unitOnlyDescription: Keeps the numbers but changes the label (80 stays as 80 {{to}})

measurementUnitChange.title: Change measurement unit
measurementUnitChange.message: You have measurements saved as {{from}}. How do you want to apply the change to {{to}}?
measurementUnitChange.convertDescription: Multiplies the saved values by the conversion factor (e.g. 90 cm → 35.43 in)
measurementUnitChange.unitOnlyDescription: Keeps the numbers but changes the label (90 stays as 90 {{to}})

chartRange.noData: Not enough data in this range

gym.manageDescription: Track your progress separately at each gym
gym.empty: You don't have any gyms yet
